phase: Phase 7 Display / Graphics Minimal Full Vertical
scope: Add DisplayCapabilityRecord as first-class semantic display authority evidence
Add RecordDisplayCapability command and DisplayCapabilityRecorded event
Validate DisplayCapability owner Store, DisplayObject, FramebufferObject, CapabilityRecord, and store-local CapabilityHandle generations
Extend CapabilityClass and AuthorityMatrix with display operations without authorizing by debug label
Record deterministic host-validation display capability evidence in target_executor
Expose display-capability stable ViewV1 and history graph edges through osctl
no_goals: pixel writes or flush command execution
treating debug labels or raw substrate mappings as authority

findings_fixed: DisplayCapability validates AuthorityObjectRef(DisplayObject) and exact capability generation instead of debug label text
DisplayCapability uses store-local CapabilityHandle slot/generation/tag and rejects forged handle class or stale display generation
ContractGraph now resolves modeled edges by exact ObjectRef generation before falling back to current id lookup
target_executor writes the semantic Store and Capability records needed by display-capability edges into contract evidence
osctl ViewV1 exposes display capability authority without leaking adapter or substrate internals
bad_smells_checked: No write, flush, or framebuffer lease execution was added in G2
No third-party graphics crate or raw substrate mapping became semantic truth
No target-side cwasm execution path was added
No existing G0/G1 display boundaries were widened
The display-runtime-g2 capability is marked as semantic evidence, not as a target manifest module import
residual_notes: G5/G6 own pixel writes and flush commands
Future store/capability package cleanup should eventually distinguish target runtime records from semantic graph records explicitly

residual_gaps: G5/G6 own pixel writes and flush commands
